subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth the truth betwixt the heavens and the earth: verily, he that hath hearkened is among the people of Bahá in the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینطق بالحق بین السموات و الارض ان الذی سمع انه من اهل البهاء فی لوح
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment
